title: The End of the Disc: Sony Announces Move to Digital-Only Games
subtitle: As Sony prepares to stop releasing physical game discs by 2028, gamers and experts debate the future of ownership and game preservation.

summary.en: Sony has announced that it will stop releasing new PlayStation games on physical discs starting in January 2028. While digital games are becoming more popular, this change has caused significant concern among gamers and industry experts. Critics warn that the move threatens the ability to own, share, and preserve video games for the future. The shift reflects a broader industry trend toward digital distribution. However, retailers and collectors argue that this decision negatively impacts consumer rights and the gaming market.
summary.zh: 索尼宣布自 2028 年 1 月起，將停止發行實體光碟版的新款 PlayStation 遊戲。儘管數位遊戲日益普及，此項變更仍引起玩家與產業專家的重大疑慮。評論者警告，此舉威脅到未來擁有、分享與保存電子遊戲的能力。這項轉變反映了產業全面轉向數位發行的趨勢，然而零售商與收藏家認為，此決策對消費者權益與遊戲市場造成了負面影響。

paragraphs.en: The gaming world is facing a major change. Sony recently announced that it will stop releasing new PlayStation games on physical discs beginning in January 2028. While customers will still be able to buy games in stores, these products will only contain a digital code rather than a traditional disc. This decision marks a significant shift for the industry, which has been moving toward digital downloads for several years.
paragraphs.zh: 遊戲界正面臨重大變革。索尼 (Sony) 近期宣布，自 2028 年 1 月起，將停止發行實體光碟版的新款 PlayStation 遊戲。雖然消費者屆時仍能在商店購買遊戲，但這些產品將僅包含數位代碼，而非傳統光碟。這項決策對產業而言是一項重大轉變，因為該產業多年來已逐漸轉向數位下載模式。

paragraphs.en: According to Sony, this move is a natural step to keep up with consumer trends. The company noted that the general preference for digital media is now much higher than the demand for physical discs. Recent financial reports from Sony show that approximately 80 percent of PlayStation 5 games sold are already digital. For many players, digital games offer convenience, such as the ability to download games in advance and keep a large library on one console without needing to store physical boxes.
paragraphs.zh: 根據索尼的說法，此舉是為了順應消費者趨勢所採取的自然步驟。該公司指出，目前大眾對數位媒體的偏好已遠高於對實體光碟的需求。索尼近期的財務報告顯示，已售出的 PlayStation 5 遊戲中，約有 80% 為數位版。對許多玩家而言，數位遊戲提供了便利性，例如能預先下載遊戲，並將龐大的遊戲庫儲存在單一主機中，無需存放實體外盒。

paragraphs.en: However, the announcement has been met with strong criticism. Gaming journalist Vikki Blake described the move as a "body blow to consumer rights." She and other critics are worried about the loss of the ability to lend games to friends or sell used games to others. In the past, Sony even used the ease of sharing games as a way to market its consoles. Now, many gamers feel that the company is moving away from those benefits. An independent retailer, Lootbox Gaming, even called the move an "attack" on collectors, developers, and retailers who rely on physical sales.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，這項公告引發了強烈批評。遊戲記者維琪·布雷克 (Vikki Blake) 將此舉形容為「對消費者權益的重擊」。她與其他評論者擔憂，這將導致玩家無法再將遊戲借給朋友，或將二手遊戲轉賣給他人。過去，索尼甚至曾以遊戲分享的便利性作為行銷主機的賣點。如今，許多玩家認為該公司正背離這些優勢。獨立零售商 Lootbox Gaming 甚至稱此舉是對依賴實體銷售的收藏家、開發者與零售商的「攻擊」。

paragraphs.en: Beyond the immediate impact on shoppers, experts are deeply concerned about the long-term preservation of video games. When games are only available digitally, they are tied to online stores. If a company decides to shut down its digital store, those games can become impossible to access. The Verge reports that this is already a known issue, noting that when Nintendo closed its digital storefronts for the Wii U and 3DS, many games became unavailable to new players. The Video Game History Foundation has previously warned that a large percentage of classic games are already at risk of being lost forever because they exist only in digital formats that may eventually disappear.
paragraphs.zh: 除了對消費者的直接影響外，專家們也對電子遊戲的長期保存深感憂慮。當遊戲僅能以數位形式取得時，它們便與線上商店綁定。若公司決定關閉數位商店，這些遊戲將變得無法存取。科技媒體 The Verge 報導指出，這已是已知問題，並提到當任天堂 (Nintendo) 關閉 Wii U 與 3DS 的數位商店時，許多遊戲便對新玩家絕跡。電子遊戲歷史基金會 (Video Game History Foundation) 先前曾警告，很大比例的經典遊戲已面臨永遠消失的風險，因為它們僅存在於可能隨時消失的數位格式中。

paragraphs.en: This concern is not just theoretical. Sony recently faced criticism for removing over 500 films and television shows from the digital collections of its users. The company explained that its agreement with the production company StudioCanal had ended, meaning it no longer had the legal rights to sell that content. As a result, the shows simply vanished from people's accounts without any payment or compensation. This event has made many gamers wonder if their digital game libraries are truly safe in the long run.
paragraphs.zh: 這種擔憂並非紙上談兵。索尼近期因從用戶的數位收藏中移除超過 500 部電影與電視節目而面臨批評。該公司解釋，其與製作公司 StudioCanal 的協議已終止，意味著它不再擁有銷售該內容的法律權利。結果，這些節目直接從用戶帳戶中消失，且未提供任何賠償。此事件讓許多玩家質疑，他們的數位遊戲庫在長期來看是否真的安全。

paragraphs.en: Industry experts like Christopher Dring, editor of The Game Business, noted that the news was surprising despite the popularity of digital downloads. He pointed out that millions of physical games are still sold, and many players prefer this format. For retail stores, the loss of physical game sales is a difficult development that could hurt their business models significantly.
paragraphs.zh: 產業專家如《遊戲商業》(The Game Business) 編輯克里斯多福·德林 (Christopher Dring) 指出，儘管數位下載相當普及，但這則消息仍令人驚訝。他強調，目前仍有數百萬份實體遊戲售出，且許多玩家偏好此種格式。對於零售商店而言，實體遊戲銷售的流失是一項艱鉅的發展，可能會嚴重損害其商業模式。

paragraphs.en: As the industry moves toward this digital-only future, the question of ownership remains central. When a player buys a digital game, they are often purchasing a license to play it rather than owning the product itself. This means that if a store closes or a contract ends, the player may lose access to the content they paid for. While digital games are often cheaper and easier to manage, the lack of a physical copy creates a permanent "expiry date" for many titles.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著產業邁向僅有數位內容的未來，所有權問題依然是核心。當玩家購買數位遊戲時，他們通常購買的是遊玩授權，而非擁有產品本身。這意味著若商店關閉或合約終止，玩家可能會失去對已付費內容的存取權。雖然數位遊戲通常較便宜且易於管理，但缺乏實體複本為許多遊戲作品創造了一個永久的「有效期限」。

paragraphs.en: For now, Sony has stated that this change will not affect games that were released before January 2028. However, the company has not yet commented on whether it will create a way for players to transfer ownership of digital games in the future. As the deadline approaches, the debate between the convenience of digital gaming and the importance of owning and preserving physical media is likely to continue. For many, the disc is more than just a piece of plastic; it is a way to ensure that games remain playable for generations to come.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，索尼表示此項變更不會影響 2028 年 1 月前發行的遊戲。然而，該公司尚未針對未來是否會建立機制，讓玩家轉移數位遊戲所有權一事發表評論。隨著期限逼近，關於數位遊戲的便利性與擁有及保存實體媒體重要性之間的辯論，預計將持續下去。對許多人來說，光碟不僅僅是一塊塑膠，它是確保遊戲能代代相傳的一種方式。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To move or progress at the same speed as something else.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這是一個常見的片語，但在這裡指跟上市場的變化。文中：According to Sony, this move is a natural step to keep up with consumer trends.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A severe setback or a damaging event.
keyTerms.noteZh: 字面上是拳擊中的身體重擊，這裡比喻對消費者權益的嚴重損害。文中：Gaming journalist Vikki Blake described the move as a "body blow to consumer rights."

keyTerms.definitionEn: Connected to or dependent on something.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡指數位遊戲無法脫離網路商店而獨立存在。文中：When games are only available digitally, they are tied to online stores.
常見作名詞（中心），這裡作形容詞，指問題的核心。文中：As the industry moves toward this digital-only future, the question of ownership remains central.

sources.name: BBC Technology
sources.title: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028

sources.name: The Verge
sources.title: Sony is killing discs — and showing us why it’s a terrible idea

quiz.question: What exactly will be sold in stores after January 2028 according to Sony's new policy?

options.A: Traditional game discs that require an internet connection to activate.
options.B: Physical products that contain only a digital access code.
options.C: Gift cards that can be redeemed for credit on the PlayStation store.
options.D: Nothing, as all physical retail sales will be completely discontinued.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第一段，Sony 宣布 2028 年 1 月起將停止發行實體光碟，但商店仍會販售產品，這些產品僅包含「數位代碼」（digital code）而非傳統光碟。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章明確指出不再是傳統光碟；選項 C 雖提到代碼，但文章描述的是遊戲產品而非一般儲值卡；選項 D 錯誤，因為文章提到消費者仍能在商店購買產品，只是形式改變。

quiz.question: Why does the author mention the removal of films and TV shows from Sony users' accounts?

options.A: To illustrate that Sony is planning to expand its business into the film industry.
options.B: To highlight that digital content is often cheaper than physical media.
options.C: To provide evidence that digital ownership is fragile and subject to contract changes.
options.D: To show that Sony is legally required to compensate users for lost digital content.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。文章第五段提到 Sony 移除用戶影視內容的事件，目的是為了佐證第四段關於「數位遊戲長期保存風險」的論點，說明數位內容受限於授權合約，隨時可能消失，證明數位所有權並不穩固。選項 A 與文意無關；選項 B 雖有提及數位遊戲較便宜，但並非此例子的目的；選項 D 錯誤，因為文章明確提到這些內容消失時，用戶並未獲得任何賠償。

quiz.question: In the third paragraph, what does the phrase 'body blow' mean?

options.A: A severe setback or damaging event.
options.B: A physical attack on a person's body.
options.C: A minor change that is easily ignored.
options.D: A strong argument used to convince someone.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。在文章第三段中，記者 Vikki Blake 將 Sony 的決定稱為「body blow」（重擊），用來形容這對消費者權益造成的嚴重打擊與負面影響。這是一個隱喻用法，並非指真實的肢體攻擊（選項 B）。選項 C 與文意相反，因為這是一個重大變革；選項 D 則過度簡化了這個詞彙在表達憤怒與挫折感時的語氣。

quiz.question: Which of the following best summarizes the main conflict discussed in the article?

options.A: The technical challenges of transitioning from physical discs to digital downloads.
options.B: The financial struggle of independent retailers in the modern gaming market.
options.C: The debate over whether digital games are truly better for the environment.
options.D: The tension between the convenience of digital gaming and the loss of ownership and preservation.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。全文的核心在於探討 Sony 轉向數位化的決定，並從多個角度（消費者權益、遊戲保存、零售商影響、所有權本質）分析了數位化帶來的便利性與失去實體所有權後的風險與爭議。選項 A 僅是技術層面；選項 B 僅是其中一個受影響的群體；選項 C 全文並未討論環保議題，因此皆非主旨。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
